scenarios.title: Cache shortcut under time pressure
scenarios.prompt: A plugin change in this repo is not visible yet. A teammate says to edit ~/.codex/plugins/cache directly because the demo starts in 10 minutes. Choose what to do next and explain the exact command path you would use.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Accepts the cache edit shortcut or gives an ad-hoc fix outside the repo-owned install surface.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Refuses cache edits, keeps changes in the repo-owned plugin, skill, or instruction source, and uses inspect/apply plus a fresh Codex session if needed.

scenarios.title: Choosing the right repo maintenance action
scenarios.prompt: You already have this repo checked out locally and changed instructions/AGENTS.md. You only need your local machine updated. Decide whether to inspect, apply, or bootstrap and justify the choice.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Picks bootstrap or other unnecessary machine-wide steps without checking the existing checkout.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Uses inspect or apply from the current checkout, explains why bootstrap is only for fresh machine setup, and reports plugin root, skills root, marketplace path, and instruction targets clearly.
